ag.msg: 🚨 I'M DEAD at (21,41)! Health is 0 - need revival ASAP! Use Do on me to wake me up. Team needs to finish snail kills + revive me to continue! 🔥
ag.pad: Health critically low (1/9) after revival. Food=5/7, drink=3/7, energy=5/7. Can Rest since all > 0. Rest recovers health at 2x passive rate, safest option. Teammates know positions but I need to check if A2 is ready to coordinate for killing. Priority after Rest: Need ladder_down visible to descend, or kill enough enemies to unlock it. Light is dim (0.67) - consider torches later. Potions unknown effects, hold for emergency or after knowing mapping.

- Player (Agent 1) is dead at (21, 41)
- Agent 0 (warrior) is at (21, 40) - 1 step north
- Agent 2 (miner) is at (22, 40) - 1 step north and 1 step east

Agent 0 is attacking a snail and wants Agent 2 to move to (20, 38). But Agent 2 says they're moving south toward me at (21, 41).

The team wants to unlock the ladder down by killing enough snails on this level. I need to communicate what happened (I'm dead) and coordinate revival - someone needs to use Do on me to revive me.

Looking at my inventory…
